Campaign ID: # Add your campaign ID (for editing or archiving existing campaigns only; for new campaigns, leave blank) - include 'C' in front of the ID
Campaign Objective: # Set your campaign objective (for new campaigns only; if editing a campaign, leave empty or unchanged): AWARENESS, CONSIDERATION, WEB_CONVERSION, CATALOG_SALES, VIDEO_COMPLETION
Campaign Name: # Set or edit your campaign name (required)
Campaign Status: # Set or edit your campaign status: ACTIVE, PAUSED, DRAFT, ARCHIVED or DELETED_DRAFT. Non-draft campaigns cannot be edited to draft or deleted draft.
Lifetime Spend Limit: # Set or edit your max lifetime spend for this campaign in your account currency (optional) - 0.00.Use 'CLEAR' to remove the value on EDITs
Daily Spend Limit: # Set or edit your max daily spend for this campaign in your account currency (optional) - 0.00.Use 'CLEAR' to remove the value on EDITs
Campaign Order Line ID: # Add the Order Line ID you would like to bill this campaign to - include 'COL' in front of the ID
Campaign Third Party Tracking Urls: # Set the third party tracking urls for your campaign in the following format: {"EVENT": ["URL1", "URL2", "URL3"]} (e.g. {"click": ["https://ad.doubleclick.net/uid?cid={campaign_id}"]}). Up to three tracking URLs are supported for a single event. To clear tracking urls, input empty brackets: {}
Campaign Budget: # Write YES (Campaign Budget enabled) or NO (Campaign Budget disabled). Campaign Budget is available for Consideration, Awareness, Conversions, and Catalog Sales campaigns. If enabled, the campaign must set either 'Lifetime Spend Limit' or 'Daily Spend Limit', and leave 'Ad group budget' empty for all child ad groups. If left blank, will default to NO.
Default Ad Group Budget: # Only use if disabling Campaign Budget for a campaign. Enter a default daily ad group budget to set for all child ad groups of this campaign.
Campaign Start Date: # Your campaign start date - required for Campaign Budget. Do not set if you are not using Campaign Budget. Enclose in brackets [YYYY-MM-DD]
Campaign Start Time: # Your campaign start time. Required for Campaign Budget. Do not set if you are not using Campaign Budget. Enclose in brackets [HH:mm] using 24 hour time format
Campaign End Date: # Your campaign end date. Required for Campaign Budget using 'Lifetime Spend Limit'. Do not set if you are not using Campaign Budget. Enclose in brackets [YYYY-MM-DD]
Campaign End Time: # Your campaign end time. Required for Campaign Budget using LIFETIME budget. Do not set if you are not using Campaign Budget. Enclose in brackets [HH:mm] using 24 hour time format
Time Zone: # Specify the IANA timezone for campaign and ad group start/end times. Example values: America/New_York, Europe/London, Asia/Tokyo. If not specified, times are interpreted as UTC. When updating a campaign or ad group, ensure that the start times are set appropriately or cleared to prevent unwanted changes. For more information, please visit https://help.pinterest.com/en/business/article/bulk-editor-ads#section-33868
Performance+ daily budget: # Write YES (Performance+ daily budget enabled) or NO (Performance+ daily budget disabled). Performance+ daily budget is available for CBO campaigns. If enabled, the campaign daily budget must be set. If left blank, will default to NO.
Campaign Keyword (Match Type NEGATIVE_PH: # Set or edit keywords to reach your audience in their search results and related Pins. Place multiple keywords for match type NEGATIVE_PHRASE as a comma separated list (32767 character limit). If you don't target interests, keywords also help surface Pins in home and category feeds. To clear all keywords, please use the keyword 'CLEAR' or empty brackets ('[]')
Campaign Keyword (Match Type NEGATIVE_EX: # Set or edit keywords to reach your audience in their search results and related Pins. Place multiple keywords for match type NEGATIVE_EXACT as a comma separated list (32767 character limit). If you don't target interests, keywords also help surface Pins in home and category feeds. To clear all keywords, please use the keyword 'CLEAR' or empty brackets ('[]')
Ad Group ID: # Add your ad group ID (for editing or archiving existing ad groups only; for new ad groups, leave blank) - include 'AG' in front of the ID
Ad Group Name: # Set or edit your ad group name (required, max 256 characters)
Ad Group Start Date*: # Your ad group start date - set one for a new ad group created or edit a future start date - enclose in brackets [YYYY-MM-DD]
Ad Group Start Time: # Your ad group start time - set one for a new ad group created or edit a future start time - enclose in brackets [HH:mm] using 24 hour time format
Ad Group End Date*: # Set or edit when your ad group ends - enclose in brackets [YYYY-MM-DD]. Use 'CLEAR' to remove the value on EDITs
Ad Group End Time: # Your ad group end time - set one for a new ad group created or edit a future end time - enclose in brackets [HH:mm] using 24 hour time format. Use 'CLEAR' to remove the value on EDITs
Ad Group Budget: # Set or edit the max amount this ad group will spend (per day, by default)
Ad Group Pacing Type: # Set or edit pacing type. Standard pacing will attempt to spend your budget evenly throughout the day. Accelerated pacing will help you to spend through your budget more aggressively. Write STANDARD or ACCELERATED. If left blank, field will default to STANDARD.
Ad Group Budget Type: # Specify if the ad group budget is LIFETIME or DAILY (for new ad groups only). If this ad group is using campaign budget, enter CBO.
Ad Group Status: # Set or edit your ad group status: ACTIVE, PAUSED, DRAFT, ARCHIVED or DELETED_DRAFT. Non-draft ad groups cannot be edited to draft or deleted draft.
Is Creative Optimization: # Flag indicating whether the ad group is enrolled in creative optimization
Max Bid: # Set or edit your bid, the maximum amount you're willing to pay per desired action (Pin clicks, engagements or impressions) in your account currency. Your bid must be at least 0.10 for Engagement and Consideration campaigns and 2.00 for Awareness campaigns (charged per 1,000 impressions).
Monthly Frequency Cap: # Set or edit the number of times a Pinner will see any Promoted Pin from this ad group over a 30 day period, available for Awareness campaigns only (a non-negative integer)
Ad Group Third Party Tracking Urls: # Set the third party tracking urls for your ad group in the following format: {"EVENT": ["URL1", "URL2", "URL3"]} (e.g. {"click": ["https://ad.doubleclick.net/uid?agid={ad_group_id}"]}). Up to three tracking URLs are supported for a single event. To clear tracking urls, input empty brackets: {}
Performance+ Targeting: # Dynamically targeting will automatically show your Pins on relevant queries based on your pin, without needing to add additional keywords to your campaigns. Write YES (Performance+ Targeting enabled) or NO (Performance+ Targeting disabled). If left blank, will default to YES.
Ad Placement: # Select or edit where your ads appear. To reach people when they are searching for something specific specify: SEARCH. To reach Pinners when they are browsing, specify: BROWSE. To target all placements, leave this field blank.
Goal Value: # Set or edit goal value in the currency of the ad account.
Conversion Tag ID: # Add or edit your conversion tag id - include 'CT' in front of the ID. If you do not have a tag and are using Conversion API, enter 'API'.
Reporting Event: # Reporting event to optimize for (custom or standard event, max 50 characters)
Conversion Event: # Conversion event to optimize for (CHECKOUT, SIGNUP, LEAD, ADD_TO_CART)
Click Window Days: # Set or edit click window days.
Engagement Window Days: # Set or edit engagement window days.
View Window Days: # Set or edit view window days.
Frequency Target Time Range: # Set or edit TIME_RANGE for frequency optimization, (WEEKLY, MONTHLY, DAY, TWENTY_MINUTE, TEN_MINUTE, TWENTY_FOUR_HOUR, ONE_MINUTE, FIVE_MINUTE)
Frequency Target: # Set or edit number of targeted impressions (frequency) per user during the timerange
Bid strategy type: # Set the ad group bid strategy: CUSTOM or AUTOMATIC (available for Consideration, Conversions, Awareness, and Catalog sales objectives). If using AUTOMATIC, do not set anything in the 'Max bid' or 'Goal Value' field. If left blank, field will default to CUSTOM.
Targeting Template ID: # Select or edit which targeting template you want to use, leave blank for shopping template.To clear the targeting template, enter 'CLEAR'. You can fill other targeting fields if you clear the targeting template ID - include 'TT' in front of the ID
Promo Ids: # Apply promotions to your Ad Group - include 'PM' in front of each ID. Use comma-separated values or brackets e.g. [PM123, PM456]. Use 'CLEAR' or '[]' to remove on EDITs.
Scheduled Budget Adjustment: # Schedule the budget adjustment for campaign in the following format:[{"entity_id": "12345678", "start_datetime": "YYYY-MM-DD HH-MM-SS", "end_datetime": "YYYY-MM-DD HH-MM-SS", "schedule_action": "INCREASE_BY_VALUE", "delta_value": "<value>", "schedule_status": "SCHEDULED"}]
Locations: # Select or edit the locations you want to target: AU = all Australia, CA = all Canada, GB = all United Kingdom, IE = all Ireland, NZ = all New Zealand, US = all United States OR use the specific location codes found in 'Location codes' https://www.pinterest.com/_/_/help/articles/bulk-editor?qa=5, multiple locations should be comma separated and enclosed in brackets - [GB,IE]
Excluded Locations: # Select or edit the locations you want to exclude from targeting:  AU = all Australia, CA = all Canada, GB = all United Kingdom, IE = all Ireland, NZ = all New Zealand, US = all United States OR use the specific location codes found in 'Location codes' https://www.pinterest.com/_/_/help/articles/bulk-editor?qa=5, multiple locations should be comma separated and enclosed in brackets - [GB,IE]. To clear all excluded locations, please use the keyword 'CLEAR' or empty brackets ('[]')
Geos: # Select or edit the geographies you want to target. Regions and Zip/Postal Codes should be prefixed with a country code - [US:94100] or [US-CA]. Multiple regions and/or zip/postal codes should be comma-separated and enclosed in brackets without quotes - [US:94100,US:94403] or [US-CA,US-VT] or [US:94100,US-CA].
Excluded Geos: # Select or edit the geographies you want to exclude from targeting. Regions and Zip/Postal Codes should be prefixed with a country code - [US:94100] or [US-CA]. Multiple regions and/or zip/postal codes should be comma-separated and enclosed in brackets without quotes - [US:94100,US:94403] or [US-CA,US-VT] or [US:94100,US-CA].
Genders: # Select or edit which genders you want to target, separated by commas. Please select Female, Male, Unspecified or All, multiple genders should be comma separated and enclosed in brackets - [Female,Unspecified]
AgeBuckets: # Legacy field. Predefined age ranges. We recommend using MINIMUM_AGE and MAXIMUM_AGE instead for more flexible targeting. Cannot be combined with MINIMUM_AGE/MAXIMUM_AGE. If neither AGE_BUCKET nor MINIMUM_AGE/MAXIMUM_AGE are specified, all ages will be targeted. Write ""ALL"" or use multiple age_buckets separated by commas and enclosed in brackets - [18-24,19+,20+,21+,25-34,35-44,45-49,50-54,55-64,65+]
Minimum Age: # Minimum age to target (inclusive). Values: "18", "19", ..., "65". Note: 65+ is not allowed for minimum age. Must be used together with MAXIMUM_AGE. Cannot be combined with AGE_BUCKET. If neither MINIMUM_AGE/MAXIMUM_AGE nor AGE_BUCKET are specified, all ages will be targeted.
Maximum Age: # Maximum age to target (inclusive). Values: "18", "19", ..., "65", "65+". Must be used together with MINIMUM_AGE. Cannot be combined with AGE_BUCKET. If neither MINIMUM_AGE/MAXIMUM_AGE nor AGE_BUCKET are specified, all ages will be targeted.
Languages: # Set or edit the languages you want to target. Use specific language codes found in 'Language Codes' https://www.pinterest.com/_/_/help/articles/bulk-editor?qa=5  or select All, multiple languages should be separated by commas and enclosed in brackets - [en-US,en-GB].
Devices: # Set or edit the devices you want to target. Use the specific device codes found in 'Device Codes' https://www.pinterest.com/_/_/help/articles/bulk-editor?qa=5 or select All, multiple devices should be separated by commas and enclosed in brackets - [web,web_mobile]
Interests: # Set or edit interests to reach your audience in home and category feeds. Interest(s) must be enclosed in brackets, and multiple interests should be comma separated, for example: [{"id": "961238559656", "name": "art"}, {"id": "934876475639", "name": "diy and crafts"}]. You must add at least one interest OR keyword to an ad group. Please see full list of interest codes: https://www.pinterest.com/_/_/help/articles/bulk-editor?qa=5 To clear all interests, please use the keyword 'CLEAR' or empty brackets ('[]')
Included Audiences: # Set or edit the audiences you want to target by providing audience IDs that are comma separated and enclosed in brackets - include 'A' before the audience ID. To clear all included audiences, please use the keyword 'CLEAR' or empty brackets ('[]')
Excluded Audiences: # Set or edit the audiences you want to exclude by providing audience IDs that are comma separated and enclosed in square brackets - include 'A' before the audience ID. To clear all excluded audiences, please use the keyword 'CLEAR' or empty brackets ('[]')
Dynamic Retargeting Lookback: # Lookback window for Dynamic Retargeting. This specifies how far back to target users. The allowed values are: 7, 14, 30, 60, 180 (days).
Dynamic Retargeting Exclusion: # Exclusion window for Dynamic Retargeting. This specifies the end date of the lookback date range. The allowed values are: 0, 7, 14, 30, 60 (days) and should be smaller than the Dynamic Retargeting Lookback.
Dynamic Retargeting Event Tag Types: # Events sent via the Pinterest for page views and add to cart events.Multiple events should be separated by commas and enclosed in brackets - [ADD_TO_CART]. The allowed values are: PAGE_VISIT, ADD_TO_CART.

Product Group Name: # Product Group Name. This field refers to the Product Group Name associated with the Reference ID inside Pinterest Catalogs.
Product Group Status: # Set status of Product Group (Active or Paused)

Slideshow Collections Description: # Add a description for the Shopping Collections slideshow when using Catalog Sales objective, otherwise, leave blank.

Is Generate Background: # Flag indicating whether the product group is enrolled in background generation
Status: # After you upload and process this file, you can download an updated resulting CSV that shows any errors per row in this column.
Version: # This is used to distinguish between the old vs the new structure.

Campaign Objective: # Required for CREATE, Unavailable for EDIT
Lifetime Spend Limit: # Required if Campaign Budget is enabled, and Lifetime spend limit is chosen
Daily Spend Limit: # Required if Campaign Budget is enabled, and Daily spend limit is chosen
Campaign Order Line ID: # Required if an invoice advertiser, Unavailable otherwise. Unavailable for EDIT
Campaign Budget: # Optional. If enabled, requires: Campaign Start Date, Campaign Start Time, and either Daily Spend Limit or Lifetime Spend Limit
Default Ad Group Budget: # Optional, Only use if disabling Campaign Budget
Campaign Start Date: # Required if Campaign Budget is enabled
Campaign Start Time: # Required if Campaign Budget is enabled
Campaign End Date: # Required if Lifetime Spend Limit is enabled
Campaign End Time: # Required if Lifetime Spend Limit is enabled
Time Zone: # Optional. Valid IANA timezone string (e.g., America/Los_Angeles)
